title.zh: HTML 表單 → Worker → 資料庫

subtitle.en: The classic flow: submit a form, save it, show it back — with real server-side validation
subtitle.zh: 最經典的流程：送出表單、存起來、再顯示出來——搭配真正的伺服器端驗證

tagline.en: A contact or signup form that posts to a Worker, gets validated, and is saved to a D1 database.
tagline.zh: 一個聯絡或註冊表單：POST 到 Worker、通過驗證，再存進 D1 資料庫。

text.en: This is the most common job in web development: a visitor fills in a form, you save what they typed, and you confirm it worked. We will wire three layers together — a front-end HTML form, a Cloudflare Worker (your server-side code that runs at the edge), and a D1 database (a serverless SQL database) where each submission becomes one row.
text.zh: 這是網頁開發最常見的任務：訪客填寫表單、你把他輸入的內容存起來、再回覆他成功了。我們要把三個層串在一起——前端 HTML 表單、一個 Cloudflare Worker（在邊緣執行的伺服器端程式碼）、以及一個 D1 資料庫（無伺服器的 SQL 資料庫），每一筆送出都會變成資料表裡的一列。

text.en: A reception desk. The visitor hands over a paper form (the HTML form). The receptionist checks it is filled in correctly (the Worker validating), then files it in a drawer (D1). If a field is blank, the receptionist hands it back and points at the problem — it never goes in the drawer.
text.zh: 一個服務櫃台。訪客遞交一張紙本表單（HTML 表單）。櫃台人員檢查是不是都填對了（Worker 驗證），再歸檔進抽屜（D1）。如果有欄位空白，櫃台會把表單退回來、指出問題——它永遠不會進抽屜。

code.en:
flowchart TD
  U["Visitor / Browser"] -->|"Fill in and submit"| F["Front-end page (HTML + JS)"]
  F -->|"fetch POST /api/submit"| W["Worker (validate + logic)"]
  W -->|"INSERT one row"| D["D1 database"]
  D -->|"success / failure"| W
  W -->|"JSON response"| F
  F -->|"Show success or error"| U
code.zh:
flowchart TD
  U["訪客 / 瀏覽器"] -->|"填寫並送出"| F["前端網頁 (HTML + JS)"]
  F -->|"fetch POST /api/submit"| W["Worker (驗證 + 邏輯)"]
  W -->|"INSERT 一筆資料"| D["D1 資料庫"]
  D -->|"成功 / 失敗"| W
  W -->|"JSON 回應"| F
  F -->|"顯示成功或錯誤"| U

text.en: Each layer has one clear job. Keeping them separate is what makes the app easy to reason about and secure.
text.zh: 每一層都只負責一件事。把它們分開，才能讓應用既好理解又安全。

text.en: HTML for the fields, plus JS that intercepts submit and sends the data with fetch. It also shows success or error messages.
text.zh: 用 HTML 做出欄位，再用 JS 攔截送出動作、用 fetch 把資料傳出去，並負責顯示成功或錯誤訊息。

text.en: Receives the POST, validates every field, and only then writes to the database. This is the one place you can actually trust.
text.zh: 接收 POST、驗證每一個欄位，確認無誤才寫進資料庫。這是唯一你真正能信任的地方。

text.en: A SQL database that keeps every submission as a row. The Worker talks to it through the env.DB binding.
text.zh: 一個 SQL 資料庫，把每筆送出存成一列。Worker 透過 env.DB binding（綁定）跟它溝通。

text.en: A free, puzzle-free bot check. Add it to stop spam from flooding your table.
text.zh: 免費、不用解拼圖的機器人檢查。加上它可以防止垃圾訊息灌爆你的資料表。

text.en: With Workers static assets, the same Worker can serve your HTML page (e.g. /) and handle the API (/api/submit). Because they share an origin, the fetch needs no CORS setup.
text.zh: 透過 Workers 静態資源（static assets），同一個 Worker 可以同時伺服你的 HTML 頁面（例如 /）跟處理 API（/api/submit）。因為同源，fetch 就不需要設定 CORS。

text.en: We only need one table: submissions. Each row is one filled-in form. The id auto-increments, and created_at is stamped automatically so you know when each message arrived.
text.zh: 我們只需要一個資料表：submissions。每一列就是一筆填好的表單。id 會自動遞增，created_at 會自動蓋上時間，讓你知道每筆訊息什麼時候進來的。

code.en:
erDiagram
  SUBMISSIONS {
    integer id PK "primary key"
    text name "visitor name"
    text email "contact email"
    text message "message body"
    text created_at "created time"
  }
code.zh:
erDiagram
  SUBMISSIONS {
    integer id PK "主鍵"
    text name "訪客姓名"
    text email "聯絡信箱"
    text message "訊息內容"
    text created_at "建立時間"
  }

blocks.body:
-- schema.sql
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS submissions (
  id         INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
  name       TEXT NOT NULL,
  email      TEXT NOT NULL,
  message    TEXT NOT NULL,
  created_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now'))
);

title.en: Let the database stamp the time

text.en: Using DEFAULT (datetime('now')) means you never have to send created_at from the client — the server decides the time, so it cannot be faked.
text.zh: 用 DEFAULT (datetime('now')) 代表你永遠不用從前端傳 created_at——時間由伺服器決定，所以偽造不了。

text.en: Follow one submission from click to confirmation. Notice that validation happens on the Worker, and the database is only touched when every field is valid.
text.zh: 跟著一筆送出，從點擊一路看到回覆。注意驗證是在 Worker 上進行，而且只有當每個欄位都合法時，才會動到資料庫。

title.zh: 送出 → 驗證 → 儲存 → 回覆

code.en:
sequenceDiagram
  participant U as "Visitor"
  participant F as "Front-end page"
  participant W as "Worker"
  participant D as "D1 database"
  U->>F: Fill in form and click submit
  F->>W: POST /api/submit (JSON)
  W->>W: Validate fields (name / email / message)
  alt Fields valid
    W->>D: INSERT INTO submissions
    D-->>W: Write succeeded
    W-->>F: 201 Created + JSON
    F-->>U: Show success message
  else Fields invalid
    W-->>F: 400 + error list
    F-->>U: Show field errors
  end
code.zh:
sequenceDiagram
  participant U as "訪客"
  participant F as "前端網頁"
  participant W as "Worker"
  participant D as "D1 資料庫"
  U->>F: 填寫表單並按下送出
  F->>W: POST /api/submit (JSON)
  W->>W: 驗證欄位 (姓名 / 信箱 / 訊息)
  alt 欄位有效
    W->>D: INSERT INTO submissions
    D-->>W: 寫入成功
    W-->>F: 201 Created + JSON
    F-->>U: 顯示成功訊息
  else 欄位無效
    W-->>F: 400 + 錯誤清單
    F-->>U: 顯示欄位錯誤
  end

text.en: The Worker answers 201 (created) on success and 400 (bad request) on invalid input. The front-end reads res.ok to decide whether to clear the form or show errors.
text.zh: Worker 成功時回 201（已建立）、輸入不合法時回 400（請求有誤）。前端看 res.ok 來決定要清空表單還是顯示錯誤。

text.en: Here is the whole thing: the database and table, the wrangler config, the front-end form, and the Worker that ties it together. Copy each piece into the matching file.
text.zh: 下面是全部：資料庫與資料表、wrangler 設定、前端表單，以及把它們串起來的 Worker。把每一段貼進對應的檔案里。

text.en: Save the CREATE TABLE above as schema.sql, then run these. The --remote flag means 'apply to the real cloud database' (leave it off to test locally).
text.zh: 把上面的 CREATE TABLE 存成 schema.sql，再跑這兩行。--remote 代表「套用到雲端上真正的資料庫」（不加就是在本機測試）。

code.body:
# 1) Create the database (copy the printed database_id)
npx wrangler d1 create contact-db

# 2) Apply the table from schema.sql to the real cloud database
npx wrangler d1 execute contact-db --remote --file=./schema.sql

text.en: Paste the database_id from step 1. The binding name DB is how your Worker reaches the database as env.DB. The assets block lets the same Worker serve your HTML.
text.zh: 貼上第 1 步拿到的 database_id。binding 名稱 DB 就是你的 Worker 用 env.DB 存取資料庫的方式。assets 那段讓同一個 Worker 能伺服你的 HTML。

text.en: Save this as public/index.html. It uses FormData to gather the fields, sends them as JSON with fetch, and updates the status line based on the response.
text.zh: 把這個存成 public/index.html。它用 FormData 收集欄位、用 fetch 以 JSON 送出，再依回應更新狀態文字。

text.en: Save this as src/index.js. It checks the method and path, validates every field, and uses a prepared statement with bind() so user input can never become SQL.
text.zh: 把這個存成 src/index.js。它檢查方法與路徑、驗證每個欄位，並用帶 bind() 的預備語句，讓使用者輸入永遠不會變成 SQL。

text.en: Add the Turnstile widget to the form, then verify the token at the very top of the Worker — before validation — so bots are rejected before they ever touch your validation or database.
text.zh: 在表單加上 Turnstile widget，再在 Worker 最上方（驗證之前）驗證 token——讓機器人在碰到你的驗證或資料庫之前就被擋下。

text.en: Publish the Worker. Your form page and API go live on the same URL.
text.zh: 發布這個 Worker。你的表單頁面跟 API 就在同一個網址上線了。

text.en: Server-side validation, branch by branch
text.zh: 伺服器端驗證，一條條分支

text.en: This is the decision the Worker makes for every request. There is exactly one happy path (save and return 201) and one rejection path (return 400 with a list of what is wrong).
text.zh: 這就是 Worker 對每個請求做的判斷。恰好只有一條順利路徑（儲存並回 201）和一條拒絕路徑（回 400 並附上哪裡有問題的清單）。

code.en:
flowchart TD
  A["Receive POST request"] --> B["Parse JSON body"]
  B --> C{"All fields valid?"}
  C -->|"Yes"| D["INSERT INTO submissions"]
  D --> E["Return 201 + success"]
  C -->|"No"| F["Collect error messages"]
  F --> G["Return 400 + error list"]
code.zh:
flowchart TD
  A["收到 POST 請求"] --> B["解析 JSON 內容"]
  B --> C{"欄位全部通過?"}
  C -->|"是"| D["INSERT INTO submissions"]
  D --> E["回傳 201 + 成功"]
  C -->|"否"| F["收集錯誤訊息"]
  F --> G["回傳 400 + 錯誤清單"]

title.zh: 絕不要信任前端——為什麼？

text.en: HTML attributes like required or type=email are only hints for honest users. Anyone can open the dev tools, or send a raw request with curl, and skip the page entirely. The Worker is the real guard: it must re-check length, format, and required fields itself, because it is the only code an attacker cannot edit.
text.zh: HTML 上的 required 或 type=email 只是給老實使用者的提示。任何人都可以打開開發者工具，或用 curl 直接送一個原始請求，完全跳過頁面。Worker 才是真正的守門員：它必須自己重新檢查長度、格式與必填欄位，因為它是攻擊者唯一改不了的程式碼。

text.en: Stops the browser's default form submit (a full-page reload) so your JS can send the data with fetch instead.
text.zh: 阻止瀏覽器預設的表單送出（整頁重新載入），讓你的 JS 改用 fetch 把資料送出。

text.en: A built-in object that grabs all named inputs from a form. Object.fromEntries turns it into a plain object ready for JSON.stringify.
text.zh: 一個內建物件，能抓出表單裡所有有 name 的欄位。Object.fromEntries 再把它變成可以交給 JSON.stringify 的純物件。

text.en: prepare() + bind() keep user input out of the SQL text. The ? placeholders are filled as values, so input can never run as code — this blocks SQL injection.
text.zh: prepare() 加 bind() 把使用者輸入跟 SQL 文字分開。? 佔位符是當「值」填進去的，所以輸入永遠不會被當程式執行——這能擋下 SQL 注入攻擊。

text.en: A binding is a named connection from your Worker to a resource. wrangler.jsonc maps the name DB to your database; in code it appears as env.DB.
text.zh: binding 是你 Worker 到某個資源的一條具名連線。wrangler.jsonc 把名稱 DB 對到你的資料庫；程式裡就是 env.DB。

text.en: 201 = created (success). 400 = bad request (your input is wrong). 403 = forbidden (e.g. bot check failed). The front-end branches on them.
text.zh: 201 = 已建立（成功）。400 = 請求有誤（你的輸入不對）。403 = 禁止（例如機器人檢查未通過）。前端依這些狀態碼分支。

text.en: A one-time pass the widget adds to the form. The Worker sends it to Cloudflare's Siteverify API to confirm a real human submitted it.
text.zh: widget 加進表單的一次性通行證。Worker 把它送到 Cloudflare 的 Siteverify API，確認是真人送出的。

title.en: Validate, then store — in that order
title.zh: 先驗證、再儲存——順序別錯

text.en: A common bug is inserting first and validating later. Always reject bad input before the INSERT so your table never fills with junk or oversized rows.
text.zh: 一個常見的 bug 是先 INSERT 再驗證。請務必在 INSERT 之前就拒絕不合法的輸入，你的資料表才不會被垃圾或超大的資料塞滿。

en: Return a structured errors object (per field) so the front-end can point at each problem, not just say 'failed'.
Trim inputs and cap their length on the server; never rely on maxlength in HTML alone.
Wrap request.json() in try/catch — a malformed body should give a clean 400, not a crash.
Add an index on created_at if you list recent submissions often, to read fewer rows.
Store the Turnstile secret with 'wrangler secret put TURNSTILE_SECRET_KEY' — never hardcode it.
D1's free tier gives 5M rows read and 100K rows written per day — plenty for a contact form.
zh: 回傳一個結構化的 errors 物件（每個欄位一個），讓前端能指出每個問題，而不是只說「失敗」。
在伺服器端 trim 輸入並限制長度；千萬不要只靠 HTML 的 maxlength。
把 request.json() 包進 try/catch——格式不對的 body 應該回一個乾淨的 400，而不是讓程式崩潰。
如果你常列出最近的送出，在 created_at 建立索引（index）以減少讀取的列數。
用 'wrangler secret put TURNSTILE_SECRET_KEY' 存放 Turnstile 密鑰——絕不要寫死在程式裡。
D1 免費額度每天給 500 萬列讀取、10 萬列寫入——對一個聯絡表單絕對夠用。

text.en: Layer your defenses: HTML hints for UX, Worker validation for correctness, prepared statements against injection, and Turnstile against bots. No single layer is enough on its own.
text.zh: 把防禦分層疊起來：HTML 提示管體驗、Worker 驗證管正確性、預備語句擋注入、Turnstile 擋機器人。單靠任一層都不夠。
